summary: Comprehensive testing of role-based access control and data isolation in Gallery CRM. All 16 test cases passed. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified including login with 3 different roles, sidebar filtering, vehicle modals, and data isolation.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) on initial render - cosmetic only
React console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>' - likely due to visual editor wrapper. Functionality works correctly.

seed_data_used.users: 4 users in same org - Test Galeri (admin), Ahmet Satışçı (satis), Zeynep Muhasebeci (muhasebe), Aslanbaş Oto (satis)
seed_data_used.cars: 2 cars - Mercedes C200 (created by satis), BMW 320i (created by admin)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All role-based features verified working. Data isolation: satis sees only their own cars (1), muhasebe/admin see all org cars (2). Sidebar filtering: satis cannot see Kullanıcılar/Gelir&Gider/Raporlar; muhasebe cannot see Stok/Konsinye/Satılan Araçlar/Kullanıcılar. Person filter on FinancePage works for admin/muhasebe only. Word export working (not Excel). Vehicle Detail and Expenses modals accessible via three-dot menu.

mocked_apis.Email verification: MOCKED - verification code displayed on screen

features_verified.org_based_data_isolation: WORKING - different orgs' data do not mix, satis sees only own data
features_verified.role_based_sidebar_filtering: WORKING - each role sees appropriate menu items only
features_verified.person_filter_for_muhasebe_admin: WORKING - dropdown with 5 options (includes all org users)
features_verified.vehicle_detail_modal: WORKING - opens from three-dot menu with full car info
features_verified.vehicle_expenses_modal: WORKING - opens from three-dot menu showing car transactions
features_verified.word_export: WORKING - button says 'Word' and downloads .docx files
